upperBrass.description: Command leadership setting strategic direction and maintaining disciplined, dependable standards across all operations.

missionCommanders.subtitle: Mission
missionCommanders.title: Commanders
missionCommanders.description: Mission planning and execution with precision estimating, strategic scheduling, and tactical project coordination.

fieldOfficers.subtitle: Field

employeeTestimonials.subtitle: What Our Team Members
employeeTestimonials.title: Say About Us
employeeTestimonials.description: Hear directly from the professionals who bring our partnership philosophy to life every day through dependable execution and service-earned values.

culture.subtitle: Our Partnership
culture.title: Company Culture
culture.description: All for one, one for all is how we partner, grow, and succeed together. Our people-centered culture supports Client Partners, communities, and one another with safety, quality, and transparent communication.

teamUnity.title: Team Unity
teamUnity.description: From veterans to civilians and office to field, we operate as one team with shared values rooted in discipline and construction excellence.

mutualSupport.title: Mutual Support
mutualSupport.description: We mentor each other, share hard-earned knowledge, and make sure no one faces challenges alone as the team grows together.

sharedSuccess.title: Shared Success
sharedSuccess.description: When our client partners win, we all win. We celebrate achievements, learn from setbacks, and build relationships that outlast project delivery.

veteranDiscipline.title: Veteran-Owned Discipline
veteranDiscipline.description: Veteran-owned leadership combines structured execution with practical problem-solving to deliver dependable results in every project phase.

communication.title: Open Communication & Transparency
communication.description: Every voice matters, with clear updates, direct communication, and open-book expectations that reduce surprises and build trust.

safety.title: Award-Winning Safety First
safety.description: Safety leadership drives our proven record through disciplined standards, verified programs, and consistent field accountability.

community.title: Community Focused & Regional Roots
community.description: We strengthen local communities through quality craftsmanship, long-term relationships, and investment across our Tri-State service region.

balance.title: Work-Life Balance
balance.description: We support families and personal well-being while maintaining project excellence through predictable expectations and mutual respect.

relationships.title: Long-Term Relationship Mindset
relationships.description: Our partnership model is built for long-term success, with relationship continuity that extends beyond project completion.

quote.text: When you join MH Construction, you are not just getting a job. You are joining a veteran-owned team built on integrity, transparency, and lasting relationships.
quote.author: Jeremy Thamert, Owner & President

careerGrowth.subtitle: Professional Development &
careerGrowth.title: Career Growth
careerGrowth.description: We invest in growth from day one through structured training, mentorship, and clear advancement paths so each team member can build a long-term career.

continuousTraining.title: Continuous Training
continuousTraining.description: Regular training on techniques, safety standards, and emerging tools keeps our teams ready for evolving project demands.

crossTraining.title: Cross-Training Programs
crossTraining.description: Team members expand skillsets across specialties to increase versatility, resilience, and value on every project.

mentorship.title: Structured Mentorship
mentorship.description: Experienced leaders guide developing team members through practical coaching and long-term growth planning.

careerPaths.title: Clear Advancement Paths
careerPaths.description: Transparent progression frameworks help team members grow from field roles into leadership through merit and performance.

leadershipDevelopment.title: Leadership Development
leadershipDevelopment.description: Emerging leaders receive focused development in project leadership, client relationships, and operational execution.

industryInvolvement.title: Industry Involvement
industryInvolvement.description: Active engagement with industry groups keeps our team aligned with best practices, standards, and innovation.

careersCta.subtitle: Interested in Joining

careersCta.description: Explore career opportunities and discover what makes MH Construction a great place to work, from award-winning safety culture to veteran hiring initiatives and continuous professional development.

founderTribute.subtitle: Founder
founderTribute.title: Tribute
founderTribute.description: Honoring the leadership foundation that launched MH Construction and shaped the partnership-first standards we carry forward today.
founderTribute.tributeStatementBody: Mike Holstein founded MH Construction in 2010 and set the original standard for integrity, discipline, and client-first execution. His leadership established the operational foundation that guides every mission today.

hero.titleLine1: Allies in Force: Strategic Partnership Network

partnership.subtitle: Why Build With
partnership.title: MH Construction
partnership.quote: "THE ROI IS THE RELATIONSHIP - and we prove it."
partnership.descriptionPrefix: Since 2010, MH Construction has built a reputation for honest communication, prompt payment, and a safety culture second to none
partnership.descriptionSuffix: Veteran-Owned Since January 2025 leadership means our partners get the same code of conduct that defines military service: honor, accountability, and follow-through on every commitment.

handshakes.title: Where Handshakes Still Matter
handshakes.description: Your word is your bond. We treat our Trade Partners with the same integrity and respect we give our Client Partners: face-to-face trust, mutual respect, and a shared commitment to doing what is right.

scheduling.title: Reliable Scheduling and Open Communication
scheduling.description: Transparent, open-book communication and dependable project timelines help our trade partners plan confidently and manage their resources effectively. You control it, we manage it, together.

payment.title: Fair and Prompt Payment
payment.description: Competitive compensation and reliable payment schedules support the financial health and growth of every trade partner. Building for the Client, NOT the Dollar, means treating partners with the same fairness.

safety.title: Award-Winning Safety Culture
safety.description: Our .64 EMR safety record is 40% better than the industry average. Everyone goes home safe, every single day. Partners on our sites operate within a culture of accountability and excellence.

network.subtitle: Our
network.title: Trade Partner Network
network.descriptionPrefix: Vetted companies grouped by trade and listed
network.descriptionMiddle: Partners are selected based on licensing, safety alignment, performance history, and shared values -
network.descriptionStrong: reviewed quarterly to ensure fair and current representation

hero.titleLine1: Supporting Those Who Served - One Community, One Mission
hero.titleLine4: Combat Veteran Discount at the Ready

description.highlight1: military discipline meets honest construction leadership
description.middle: - service-earned values of honesty, integrity, and relationship-first commitment guide

leadership.title: Veteran-Owned Leadership
leadership.subtitle: Service-Earned Excellence
leadership.description: Army veteran owner Jeremy Thamert brings 15+ years military aviation experience and operational discipline. Navy veteran Matt Ramsey applies disciplined execution to digital operations. Combined veteran leadership ensures every project receives dependable follow-through and clear communication.

safety.title: .64 EMR - Combat-Ready Safety
safety.subtitle: Every Team Member Returns Home
safety.description: Military-grade safety protocols with .64 EMR-40% better than industry average. 3+ years without time-loss injury. OSHA VPP Star designation. No one left behind isn't just military-it's construction standard.

experience.title: 150+ Years Combined Experience
experience.subtitle: Veteran + Civilian Excellence
experience.description: Veterans and civilians working together with 150+ years combined construction expertise. Military discipline merged with generational craftsmanship-proven methods refined through service and experience.

transparency.title: 100% Transparency
transparency.subtitle: Zero Surprises, Complete Trust
transparency.description: Open-book pricing with military-grade transparency. Complete visibility on every cost, timeline, and decision. Your word is your bond-so is ours. Honest assessments, real-time updates, zero hidden costs.

missions.title: 650+ Successful Missions
missions.subtitle: Proven Operational Excellence
missions.description: 650+ successfully completed projects since 2010. Veteran leadership brings mission planning, execution under pressure, and consistent results. Whether routine or urgent-we deliver no matter the challenges.

referrals.title: 70% Referral & Repeat Business
referrals.subtitle: Relationships That Outlast Projects
referrals.description: 70% of business from referrals and repeat partners-trust earned through action. Our commitment doesn't end when the project completes. Long-term partnerships built on service-earned values and proven integrity.

jeremy.name: Jeremy Thamert
jeremy.bio: 15+ years Army aviation experience brings operational discipline and steady leadership. Your word is your bond-service-earned integrity guides every partnership we build.

matt.name: Matt Ramsey
matt.role: Digital Marketing Manager / Safety Officer | Navy Veteran
matt.bio: Navy veteran bringing military discipline to digital excellence. Trust earned through consistent action and genuine commitment-principles guiding our veteran outreach initiatives.

combat.subtitle: Service Recognizes Service
combat.title: Combat Veteran Discount at the Ready

description.highlight1: All branches, all ranks, all eras
description.middle: - Army, Navy, Air Force, Marines, Coast Guard, and Space Force. If you served in combat, we honor that service with
description.highlight2: preferential pricing on all construction services
description.suffix: . Each discount is determined through our screening process based on your project scope, service record, and specific needs. No fine print. No gimmicks. Your service matters.

allBranches.title: All Branches Welcome
allBranches.description: Army, Navy, Air Force, Marines, Coast Guard, Space Force-we honor every branch that defended our nation in combat zones. All combat veterans qualify for consideration.

tailoredService.title: Tailored to Your Service
tailoredService.description: Every veteran's situation is unique. Discount amounts are determined case-by-case through our screening process, considering project scope, service record, and individual circumstances.

timeline.title: Combat Veteran Discount Screening Process
timeline.description: Our straightforward screening process ensures fair and respectful evaluation of every combat veteran application.

initialConsultation.title: Initial Consultation
initialConsultation.description: Contact us at {phone} or through our contact page. Mention your military service during the initial discussion. We'll schedule a face-to-face or virtual consultation to discuss your project scope and requirements.

serviceVerification.title: Service Verification
serviceVerification.description: Provide proof of combat service (DD-214, VA card, or military ID showing combat deployment). We handle all documentation with military-grade confidentiality and respect. Your privacy is our priority.

projectAssessment.title: Project Assessment
projectAssessment.description: We evaluate your project scope, timeline, and specific construction needs. Factors include project size, complexity, materials required, labor intensity, and your budget constraints.

discountDetermination.title: Discount Determination
discountDetermination.description: Based on your service record and project details, we determine an appropriate discount. Considerations include combat service duration, decorations received, current financial situation, and project urgency. Every case is unique.

transparentProposal.title: Transparent Proposal
transparentProposal.description: Receive a detailed, transparent proposal showing standard pricing, your veteran discount applied, and final project cost. No hidden fees. No surprises. No expiration on your discount-it applies to every project you do with us.

commitment.title: Our Commitment
commitment.description: This isn't a marketing gimmick or one-time promotion. As a Veteran-Owned company, honoring combat service is part of our DNA. Your word is your bond-so is ours. Every combat veteran receives fair consideration, respectful treatment, and meaningful pricing that reflects the sacrifice made for our nation.

cta.note: Direct line to Veteran-Owned leadership. No automated systems, no gatekeepers-just honest conversation with someone who understands.

description.middle: , we're deploying long-term operational programs to support veterans.

hiringPriority.label: Veteran Hiring Priority
hiringPriority.description: All qualified veterans receive priority consideration

veteranLeaders.label: Veteran Leaders
veteranLeaders.description: Army & Navy veterans in leadership positions

apprenticeship.label: Apprenticeship Programs
apprenticeship.description: Training programs for transitioning service members

hiring.title: Veteran Hiring Priority
hiring.description: Qualified veterans from all branches receive priority consideration for all positions. We're deploying tactical apprenticeship programs for transitioning service members as we build our veteran support operational network. Your military experience translates to construction excellence.

allies.title: Veteran Allies
allies.description: Recruiting Veteran-Owned Trade Partners for our growing network. As we establish company longevity, we're building partnerships with preferential opportunities for Veteran-Owned businesses.

training.title: Training & Education
training.description: Developing programs for veterans pursuing construction trades, including internship opportunities and GI Bill apprenticeship participation as we grow our veteran support network.

nonProfit.title: Verified Non-Profit Status
nonProfit.description: Verified 501(c)(3) status with transparent financials and public accountability. Open books, clear mission statements, and documented impact metrics. Organizations that operate with the same honesty and integrity we expect from ourselves.

mission.title: Veteran-Focused Mission
mission.description: Primary mission dedicated to serving veterans, active duty, or military families. Not organizations that treat veterans as an afterthought or marketing angle. Programs specifically designed by veterans, for veterans, with proven understanding of military culture.

regional.aria: Regional Presence & Impact - Local Boots on Ground
regional.title: Regional Presence & Impact
regional.description: Strong presence in Pacific Northwest with active programs in Washington, Oregon, or Idaho. Local organizations that understand regional veteran populations and Tri-Cities community needs. Measurable local impact over distant national headquarters.

collaborative.title: Collaborative Approach
collaborative.description: Organizations seeking genuine partnerships, not just donation checks. Collaborative planning, mutual support, and shared commitment to veteran welfare. Open communication, aligned values, and willingness to work together on long-term initiatives.

cta.title: Organization Partnership Inquiries
cta.description: If your veteran organization meets these criteria and seeks genuine partnership opportunities, contact us. We review all partnership proposals carefully and respond to qualified organizations within 2 business days.

bridgePaths.title: Public Sector Bridge Paths
bridgePaths.description: Move from veteran-focused values into government project planning with direct pathways for compliance, regional strategy, and project scoping.

publicSector.title: Veteran-Led Public Sector Path
publicSector.description: Bridge veteran values into public-sector delivery planning.

compliance.title: Compliance Workflow
compliance.description: Review the compliance sequence from intake through execution.

triState.description: Map WA, OR, and ID opportunities to service coverage.

nextSteps.subtitle: Partner with a Veteran-Owned, relationship-first team where honesty, integrity, professionalism, and thoroughness guide every decision. Your word is your bond, so is ours.

hero.titleComplete: Base HQ - Events: Cool Desert Nights 2026 Debrief
hero.titleBriefing: Base HQ - Events: Cool Desert Nights 2026 Briefing
hero.descriptionComplete: Thank you to the Richland and Kennewick community, event leadership, and Client Partners who made this event successful through coordinated execution.
hero.descriptionBriefing: Cool Desert Nights 2026 is scheduled for June 26-27 in Richland, WA, featuring classic cars, a Friday night cruise, and a Saturday Show 'n Shine in the Uptown Shopping Center.

logo.eventAlt: Cool Desert Nights official event logo

communityLeadership.title: MH Construction Owner Jeremy Thamert will serve on the official BBQ judging panel with his closest friends.
communityLeadership.description: Local leadership alignment supports coordinated community participation and clear communication with event leadership.

values.title: Service-Earned Values In Action
values.description: Event coordination follows the same operating standard as every MH Construction project: Honesty, Integrity, Professionalism, and Thoroughness.

thoroughness.title: Thoroughness
thoroughness.description: Details managed from schedule through close-out.

competition.title: Competition Overview
competition.description: Cool Desert Nights is a premier Tri-Cities summer event with classic cars, a Friday night cruise on George Washington Way, and a Saturday Show 'n Shine hosted in Richland's Uptown Shopping Center.

presence.title: MH Construction Presence
presence.description: Saturday Show 'n Shine includes hundreds of cars on display, plus family-friendly activities with a kids' zone, vendor booths, and community access points throughout the venue.

localImpact.title: Local Impact
localImpact.descriptionPrefix: Weekend programming includes Party in the Park, live music, food exhibitors, and a Saturday awards ceremony. MH Construction support extends to the Richland Kiwanis Pancake Breakfast,
localImpact.descriptionSuffix: , and the Party in the Park weekend draw.

boothMap.subtitle: Site Recon
boothMap.description: Our booth is staged near the BBQ competition lane for direct access to event traffic and the fleet showcase.

items.fridayCruise: Friday Cruise: Classic cars cruise along George Washington Way.
items.partyInPark: Party in the Park: Live music and community activities.
items.saturdayShow: Saturday Show 'n Shine: Vehicle displays, kids' zone, exhibitors, and awards ceremony.

action.title: Connect With the Team Before the Next Event Window
action.description1: Early online registration for cars, trucks, and motorcycles is available through the Richland Chamber. Vendor applications for 2026 are also being accepted through the chamber, and full listing details are available on Eventbrite.

readyToJoin.heading: Ready to Join Our Team?
readyToJoin.description: Start with the essentials. Share your contact information, tell us where you can contribute, and attach a resume if you have one ready. If there is a fit, we will follow up directly.
readyToJoin.enoughToBegin: Name, email, and role are enough to begin.

journey.lead: Clear steps. Direct communication. Respect for your time.
journey.description: Our process starts with a short application and moves forward only when there is a real fit. We keep the process focused and let you know what comes next.
journey.goal: The goal is a good working relationship, not unnecessary steps.

submit.title: Submit Application
submit.description: Start with the essentials: your name, email, and the role or trade you want to discuss. Add a resume or background if it helps.

review.title: Team Review
review.description: We review your application against current project needs, open roles, and the standards we expect across the company.

conversation.title: Direct Conversation
conversation.description: If there is a fit, we reach out directly to talk through your background, the work ahead, and what both sides need from the role.

interview.title: Interview and Verification
interview.description: For strong matches, we schedule an interview and verify the details needed for the position, including references, certifications, or site requirements.

offer.title: Offer & Onboarding
offer.description: When both sides are aligned, we move into an offer, paperwork, safety expectations, and a clear onboarding plan.

fastTrack.title: Quick Start When Needed
fastTrack.prefix: When project timing and role alignment are clear, strong candidates may move through the process in

typical.title: Typical Review Pace
typical.prefix: Timing depends on hiring needs, project load, and role fit, but the process stays

transparent.title: Always Transparent
transparent.prefix: We do not add steps for appearance. We keep communication clear and stay available for your

companyBenefits.title: Comprehensive Health Coverage
companyBenefits.description: Medical, dental, and vision insurance with competitive premiums and low deductibles. Supporting your health and your family's well-being.

companyBenefits.title: Retirement Planning
companyBenefits.description: 401(k) plan with generous company matching to help secure your financial future. We invest in your long-term success.

companyBenefits.title: Professional Development & Continuous Learning
companyBenefits.description: Continuing education, certifications, and training opportunities to advance your career. Regular training on new techniques, safety standards, technology, leadership development, structured mentorship, cross-training, and industry involvement.

companyBenefits.title: Work-Life Balance
companyBenefits.description: Flexible scheduling and time-off policies that respect your personal life and family commitments. We understand construction demands and support your well-being.

companyBenefits.title: Award-Winning Safety First Culture
companyBenefits.description: Industry-leading .64 EMR safety record, AGC-WA Top EMR awards, OSHA VPP Star designation, and 3+ years without time-loss injuries. Everyone goes home safe every day.

veteranBenefits.title: Veteran Hiring Priority

hero.founded: Founded 2010, Veteran-Owned Since January 2025 • BABAA (Build America, Buy America Act) Supporter
hero.mission: Building projects for the Client, NOT the Dollar
hero.serving: Tri-Cities HQ (Pasco, Richland, Kennewick) | Tri-State Licensed in WA, OR, ID

coreValues.sectionDescription: Four foundational values guide every project and partnership—focused on building projects for the client, NOT the dollar.

values.description: Full transparency—truthful assessments, open communication, honest intel. Upfront discussion of challenges and obstacles. Real-time updates on timeline or budget changes. Honest assessment when a project isn't the right fit. Complete cost breakdown before starting. Straight talk, no jargon.

Strong ethics—doing what's right even when no one's watching. Using specified materials and methods without substitutions. Comprehensive warranties—we stand behind our work. Making decisions that benefit client partners, not just our bottom line. Following through on commitments even when circumstances change. No shortcuts, period.

On time, prepared, and ready—zero excuses. Arriving on time and prepared. Clear communication in all interactions. Proper site management and organization. Treating your property with respect. Maintaining industry credentials and continuous improvement.

Meticulous planning and execution—complete documentation, zero surprises. Detailed site analysis and planning. Precision measurements and calculations. Systematic quality checkpoints at every phase. Complete documentation with photo records. Comprehensive final review with detailed punch lists.

companyStats.subtitle: Disciplined, Proven Results
companyStats.title: Proven Track Record
companyStats.description: Measurable results from a Veteran-Owned team and dedicated Build America, Buy America Act (BABAA) supporter. BABAA is a federal domestic-content requirement for certain federally funded infrastructure projects, and we stay current on compliance-forward practices for government work.

hero.sectionTagline: Transparent planning. Disciplined execution. Trusted results.
hero.sectionDescription: Commercial, industrial, and public-sector delivery across Washington, Oregon, and Idaho from our Tri-Cities headquarters. We primarily focus on commercial and industrial work, and only consider unique, highly complex, multi-million-dollar residential projects.

core.sectionDescription: Our core service is project management powered by Procore, delivering commercial and industrial construction with transparent communication, tenant improvement specialization, and ground-up commercial build execution. Every service is supported by our experienced team using AI-assisted workflows and advanced research techniques to improve planning and result accuracy.

specialty.sectionDescription: Specialized support for complex project scopes, schedules, and operational requirements, including winery pond liner installation for sludge control.

government.sectionDescription: Veteran-owned discipline and compliance-ready planning for public-sector and funded infrastructure initiatives.

areas.sectionDescription: Licensed and operating across Washington, Oregon, and Idaho with Tri-Cities headquarters support.

whyChooseUs.sectionDescription: Trust earned through transparency, proven safety, and a partnership model that outlasts project delivery.

testimonials.sectionDescription: Read testimonials from valued Client Partners across the Pacific Northwest who have experienced our collaborative excellence firsthand.

services.sectionDescription: From planning to completion, every project reflects our core values—honesty, integrity, professionalism, and thoroughness.

expertise.sectionDescription: Experienced leadership, disciplined systems, and clear communication to keep every project aligned and accountable. We deliver an exceptional partnership experience from start to finish, so you are never in the dark about your project's status or details. Our team also uses AI-assisted analysis and advanced research to validate assumptions, reduce risk, and improve decision accuracy.

process.sectionDescription: Clear milestones from first contact through close-out, led by disciplined project management in Procore with honest communication at each step.

steps.title: Initial Consultation
steps.description: We start by listening to your vision, understanding your needs, and discussing your project goals. Whether you have detailed plans or just an idea, we work with you to clarify scope, timeline, and budget expectations.

steps.title: Detailed Estimation and Planning
steps.description: Our Lead Estimator provides a comprehensive, transparent cost breakdown with no hidden fees. We analyze all variables, identify potential risks, and create a realistic timeline so you understand every aspect of your project costs upfront.

steps.title: Contract and Pre-Construction
steps.description: We finalize contracts with clear terms, obtain permits, coordinate trade partners, and schedule materials. Our Project Manager handles paperwork, submittals, and RFIs while keeping you informed through each phase.

steps.title: Construction Execution
steps.description: Our Senior Superintendent oversees on-site operations with award-winning safety standards. We manage daily project execution in Procore, provide regular progress updates, coordinate subcontractors, track RFIs and submittals, manage quality inspections, and address issues immediately.

steps.title: Quality Inspections and Compliance
steps.description: Multi-point quality inspections at every project phase ensure code compliance and craftsmanship excellence. Third-party inspections, department coordination, and complete documentation keep every milestone accountable.

steps.title: Project Close-Out and Follow-Up
steps.description: Final walkthrough, punch list completion, warranty documentation, and post-project support ensure complete satisfaction. We stay engaged beyond completion with long-term partnership support.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.description: Let's discuss your construction needs and create a plan together. Free consultation, transparent pricing, and partnership-focused collaboration from day one.

items.title: Construction Management

items.description: Transform your commercial space quickly and efficiently with expert craftsmanship. Minimal downtime, maximum results.

values.title: .64 EMR - Industry-Leading Safety
values.subtitle: Every Team Member Returns Home Safe
values.description: Multiple AGC-WA Top EMR Awards with .64 EMR—40% better than industry average. 3+ years without time-loss injury and OSHA VPP Star designation. No compromises on safety, period.

values.title: 150+ Years of Combined Experience
values.subtitle: Proven Construction Expertise
values.description: Our team brings 150+ years of combined construction expertise. Veterans and civilians working together, leveraging proven methods refined through generations. Deep experience you can trust.

values.title: Complete Transparency
values.subtitle: Zero Surprises
values.description: Open-book pricing with complete visibility on every cost, timeline, and decision. You control the project, we execute it with full transparency. No hidden costs, honest assessments at every phase. Your word is your bond—so is ours.

values.title: Long-Term Partnerships
values.subtitle: Relationships That Outlast Projects
values.description: 70% of our business comes from referrals and repeat partners—trust earned through action, not words. Our commitment doesn't end when the project completes. We're in it for the long haul, building relationships that matter. THE ROI IS THE RELATIONSHIP.

values.title: 650+ Successful Projects
values.subtitle: Proven Track Record
values.description: 650+ successfully completed projects demonstrate proven reliability. Veteran leadership brings discipline, planning under pressure, and consistent execution. Whether routine or urgent—we deliver results no matter the challenges.
highlights: Dedicated BABAA (Build America, Buy America Act) supporter

clientTestimonials.name: Captain for Special Projects
clientTestimonials.project: Admin and Dispatch Center and Fire Station 10 Remodel
clientTestimonials.quote: MH Construction defines how a professional contractor should perform. Excellent business ethics and fiscal responsibility while their construction knowledge is above their peers. We value this relationship and hope to continue growing it on more Yakima County Fire District construction projects.

clientTestimonials.name: Jesse Dunagan
clientTestimonials.project: 40,000+ sqft remodel for new base of operations
clientTestimonials.quote: MH Construction's team has been an absolute pleasure to partner with, with principles deeply appreciated by our LCSNW team: ethics, curiosity, engagement, perspective sensitivity, honesty, humility, safety, quality craftsmanship, and objective-based solutions.

clientTestimonials.name: Keith Bjella
clientTestimonials.quote: MH completed a tenant improvement for us and we could not be happier. They helped facilitate design, permitting, and construction while handling many stakeholders in stride.

clientTestimonials.name: Brandon Christensen
clientTestimonials.quote: We have worked with MH Construction on several commercial projects over the years and have been very pleased with workmanship, communication, and timeliness.

clientTestimonials.name: Samantha Schuster
clientTestimonials.quote: We are grateful to partner with MH Construction and are very satisfied with the quality and professionalism of their work. Their attention to detail and reliable results have exceeded expectations.

clientTestimonials.name: Blake Still
clientTestimonials.quote: We could not be happier with the quality of workmanship. Todd kept us informed throughout the build and delivered a strong outcome.
